problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: If Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) is applied to types, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
